g.text: Rollback Journal — Crash Recovery: Four Scenarios
Write Ordering: (1) write journal → (2) fsync journal → (3) write DB pages → (4) fsync DB → (5) delete journal
B: Crash After Journal fsync, Before DB Write
C: Crash During DB Write (Primary Case)
Green border: No recovery needed — safe outcome
Amber/Red border: Hot journal detected, pages restored
Red diamond: Crash point in write-ordering protocol
Note | Delete IS the commit point
